chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Constitutional Petition No. D-4061 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge(s) 1. For order on Misc. No.16665/2025 (Urgency) 2. For order on office objection Nos.1 to 8 3. For order on Misc. No.16666/2025 (Exemption) 4. For order on Misc. No.16667/2025 (Stay) 5. For hearing of main case 26.8.2025 Mr. Muddassar Ahmed advocate for the petitioner -------------------------------- 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2-5. The petitioner has made a complaint to the Sindh Building Control Authority (SBCA) through its Smart Complaint Redressal Mechanism (SCRM) on 24.3.2025, which is over five months ago. This complaint has still not been attended to by the Director General, SBCA. The Director General, SBCA is directed to decide the complaint of the petitioner, which is at page 21 of the file, within two months of the date of this order. A copy of this order alongwith page 21 of the file shall be sent to the Director General, SBCA, for compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Zahid/*
